text.value: Adding these bots automatically opens the game server and enables game-joining for all players. They act as required placeholders so you can start and test a match immediately, even when playing alone. They don't fight. They only join a Team and move on the Game field.
I don't have Minecraft? No Problem this Demoserver is not connected any Mojang Sercives. You can play with an Offline account, for example with the Prism Launcher
Hey {{variables.name}}, this is the Demo Dashboard
A Demonstration of the Planned Features
Are you sure you want to Terminate your Demo Server?
Thank you, for testing the Snowballmatch Plugin
Please use your exact Minecraft Name. Your Permissions are giving over that.
To give everyone a chance of testing this plugin without much testing we can setup for you a test Server.
Finished? Click here to make space for other Testers
⚠️ IMPORTANT: Automated Server Access for Bots ⚠️
1. Start Minecraft (if not available, please see below) on version 1.21.11 or lower.
2. Enter your Minecraft username below and click Start on the Demo Server. Wait for everything to start.
TIP: The Commands /game and /team are for basic game management. If you want a detailed manual, please look into my GitHub repo.
